creator: mattdharris@users.sourceforge.net
text:
This port cannot be built because the distribution sites are down.  Beyond that, the website for the software is down, so I cannot see changelogs/download a more recent version to try to update the port.  I'll keep trying to hit its website, but if it doesn't work by December, it should probably be deleted.  I've set deprecated for now so that folks will know that the problem is known, and it won't waste time for the pkg build system.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
